TestCase z21Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_a = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    if (t1.a != NULL && t1.n1 > 0) {
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    }
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n1 < 1
    if (follow_case.n1 < 1) {
        // No elements to modify, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    // Find indices of elements less than 999
    int* candidates = (int*)malloc(follow_case.n1 * sizeof(int));
    int count = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n1; i++) {
        if (follow_case.a[i] < 999) {
            candidates[count++] = i;
        }
    }
    if (count > 0) {
        // Select a random index among candidates
        int idx_in_candidates = rand() % count;
        int target_idx = candidates[idx_in_candidates];
        follow_case.a[target_idx] = 999;
    }
    free(candidates);

    return follow_case;
}
